name: S5_expressions_pack
description: Standalone runner for five expression tests: arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, assignments. Params are comma‑separated ints. Returns bitmap of failing tests; 255 no args; 254 unknown name.
io_hint: Process all tokens with the same split→match→parse→call pipeline and accumulate bits; results must be independent of argument order and free of special-casing.
